channel.title: Policy-Pages on GAJAB TOOLS
channel.description: Recent content in Policy-Pages on GAJAB TOOLS

item.title: Terms & Conditions - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Terms & Conditions

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

Welcome to GajabTools.com. By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms and Conditions.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By using this website, you confirm that you accept these Terms & Conditions and agree to follow them. If you do not agree, please do not use the website.

2. Use of Website

GajabTools.com provides browser-based online tools including but not limited to image tools, resume generators, calculators, converters, and utilities.

item.title: Privacy Policy - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

Welcome to GajabTools.com. Your privacy is extremely important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information when you use our website.

1. Information We Collect

a) Personal Information

We do not collect personal information unless you voluntarily provide it (for example, through a contact form).

  • Name
  • Email address
  • Message details

b) Non-Personal Information

We may automatically collect certain non-personal information such as:

item.title: DMCA Policy - Gajab Tools
item.description:
DMCA Policy

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

GajabTools.com respects the intellectual property rights of others and expects users of our website to do the same.

If you believe that any content available on our website infringes your copyright, you may submit a DMCA takedown request.

1. Copyright Infringement Notification

If you are a copyright owner (or authorized to act on behalf of one) and believe that your copyrighted material has been used on our website without permission, please provide the following information:

item.title: Disclaimer - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Disclaimer

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

The information and tools provided on GajabTools.com are for general informational and utility purposes only.

1. General Information Disclaimer

All content and tools on this website are provided in good faith. However, we make no representation or warranty of any kind regarding the accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, or completeness of any information.

Your use of the website and its tools is solely at your own risk.

item.title: Cookie Policy - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Cookie Policy

Effective Date: 19 February 2026

Website: https://gajabtools.com

This Cookie Policy explains how GajabTools.com uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website.

GajabTools.com is a privacy-focused, browser-based tools platform. We do not store user data on our servers.

1. What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help improve user experience and website functionality.

2. How We Use Cookies

We may use cookies for the following purposes:

item.title: Contact Us- Gajab Tools
item.description:
Contact Us

If you have any questions, suggestions, feedback, or business inquiries, feel free to reach out to us.

Email: yojnaportalhelp@gmail.com
Instagram: Gajab Jobs Instagram
Website: gajabtools.com

Send Us a Message

We respect your privacy. We do not store your contact form data on our servers.

item.title: About Us - Gajab Tools
item.description:
About Us

Welcome to GajabTools.com — a modern, privacy-focused online tools platform designed to make your digital tasks faster, easier, and more secure.

Our mission is simple: Provide powerful browser-based tools that work instantly without uploading your data to any server.

Who We Are

GajabTools.com is an independent online tools website created to help users access useful utilities without complicated software installations.

We focus on:

  • Fast and lightweight tools
  • 100% browser-based processing
  • User privacy and security
  • Simple and clean interface

What We Offer

Our website provides various tools including but not limited to:
